title: Code Formatting Practice
description:
Practice writing clean, well-formatted utility functions for text processing.

1. `snake_case(text)` — Converts a phrase to snake_case (lowercase, spaces replaced with underscores)
2. `count_words(text)` — Returns the number of words in the text
3. `clean_whitespace(text)` — Removes leading/trailing whitespace and collapses multiple internal spaces to single spaces
4. `format_phone(digits)` — Formats a 10-digit string as "(123) 456-7890"

Examples:
  snake_case("Hello World") → "hello_world"
  count_words("the quick brown fox") → 4
  clean_whitespace("  hello   world  ") → "hello world"
  format_phone("1234567890") → "(123) 456-7890"

Use string slicing: digits[:3], digits[3:6], digits[6:]

clean_whitespace should trim and collapse spaces
